chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 92 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.17 2. For hearing of main case 23.09.2025 None present This reference application is pending since 2016 without any progress. Applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone-IV LTU, Karachi remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
